PSG Hospitality & VIP Ticket Packages 2025/26
Paris St Germain
Hospitality & VIP Tickets
Parc des Princes, Paris
Enjoy one of our official hospitality ticket packages to see PSG at the Parc des Princes.
Paris St Germain, under Luis Enrique, had a fantastic season winning the Champions League for the first time and retaining Ligue 1.
This season you can watch some of top names in French and world football at the Parc De Princes as PSG with one of our official hospitality packages.
Stand Out Fixtures:
PSG v Spurs 26 November
PSG v Lyon 15 December
PSG v Newcastle United 28 January
PSG  v Marseille 16 March
Email info@rockethospitality.com or call 0207 1180456
Our Paris St Germain VIP ticket packages include:
Hospitality lounge opens 90 minutes prior to kick off
Complimentary bar including champagne
Pre-match canapés and hospitality
Official seats in block 108 located alongside the pitch
Event management
PSG Fixtures at the Parc Des Princes 2025/26
PSG v Angers 24 August
PSG v Lens 13 September
PSG v Auxerre 27 September
PSG v Strasbourg 18 October
PSG v Nice 1 November
PSG v Le Havre 22 November
PSG v Tottenham Hotspur 26 November
PSG v Stade Rennais 6 December
PSG v Paris FC 3 January
PSG v Lille 17 January
PSG v Newcastle 28 January
PSG v Marseille 7 February
PSG v Metz 21 February
PSG v Monaco 7 March
PSG v Nantes 14 March
PSG v Toulouse 4 April
PSG v Lyon 18April
PSG v Stade Brestois 9  May
Fixtures are subject to change.
For prices, availability and further information on our PSG hospitality and VIP ticket packages at the Parc des Princes please email us at info@rockethospitality.com

Reviews
Went with some friends to the O2 to see Pete Tong, all booked through Rocket Hospitality. From start to finish the service was first rate with Matt on hand to answer any queries and make sure all the admin and extra details were taken care of. We had an amazing, special night. It is the small things that makes events like this run smoothly and Matt and Rocket Hospitality take care of everything so you can relax and enjoy yourself. Would highly recommend and we will definitely be using Rocket Hospitality again. Thank you!
Mike
March 2026
Trustpilot
I used Rocket Hospitality to organise a surprise rugby trip for my husband’s 50th birthday, and the experience was fantastic from start to finish. I worked with Matt, who was absolutely amazing throughout the entire process. He provided all the information I needed well in advance and kept me updated every step of the way, which made everything completely stress-free. The event details for the day itself were incredibly thorough and helpful, covering everything we needed to know — including clear and easy-to-follow directions to the venue. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Rocket Hospitality and will definitely be using them again in the future.
Ann
February 2026
Trustpilot
Took some clients to 6 nations. Booked through Rocket hospitality. Get everything in plenty of time stress free. Icing on cake was Scotland beating England! Would definitely book with them again.
Damian
February 2026
Trustpilot
Booked Wales v Scotland Six Nations rugby. Easy, easy process and very straightforward guidance.Matt was always on hand to respond to any clarification I had, by return.Pricing was excellent with no hard selling or chasing.Great experience - until the next time!
Alan
February 2026
Trustpilot
Attended our first Wimbledon and had a fantastic time!! I worked with Matt on experiences and types of tickets and he was wonderful and full of great information. His advice made our trip a standout!! We can’t wait to come back. We had Debenture seating I would recommend. We can’t wait to come again! I would endorse Rocket Hospitality!
Nancy
July 2025
Trustpilot
We buy all our sports and events tickets through Rocket Hospitality and have done for years. Always so professional and trustworthy, great client service and response. Seating always good and hospitality packages super fun and high quality. 100 % recommend

Trustpilot
We truly enjoyed our first Wimbledon tournament! Matt at Rocket Hospitality walked us through the ticket purchasing process. He was very prompt in answering our questions offering us good information and advice. We would definitely use Matt again. He made the whole process easy and enjoyable!
Mary
July 2025
Trustpilot
Great company to work with for hard to get tickets. We had clear communication and an easy process to get great Wimbledon tickets. Absolutely recommend to anyone looking to go to Wimbledon.

Matt was great to work with and made my Wimbledon experience one I won't forget. I couldn't find tickets anywhere else and Matt had availability for the date and court I wanted. The tickets came to me in plenty of time before the event to help me feel fully prepared. Thanks Matt and Rocket Hospitality!
Hank

Absolutely amazing experience!  I would like to sincerely thank Matt and Rocket Hospitality for an unforgettable experience! My daughter and I attended the Billie Eilish concert, and everything — from start to finish — was perfectly organised. Communication smooth, fast, and incredibly professional. We felt taken care of every step of the way, and it was clear that every detail had been thought through. I highly recommend Rocket Hospitality to anyone looking to enjoy a special event in a truly special way. We will definitely be back!

Paris St Germain
Paris Saint-Germain Football Club (PSG) is a leading professional football team based in Paris, France. Founded in 1970, PSG quickly rose to prominence, becoming one of Europe's most successful and recognized clubs. Known for its distinctive blue, red, and white colors, PSG plays its home games at the iconic Parc des Princes stadium.
Over the years, PSG has amassed numerous domestic and international titles, including multiple Ligue 1 championships and Coupe de France trophies.

Official Paris Saint-Germain Tickets – Secure Your Seat at Parc des Princes
Mission Impossible Tickets is your trusted source for official PSG match tickets and premium hospitality packages.
Book safely online for every Paris Saint-Germain home fixture at Parc des Princes, from Ligue 1 battles to Champions League nights in Paris.
Experience the electric atmosphere in the French capital and watch stars like Ousmane Dembélé, Warren Zaïre-Emery, Vitinha, and Marquinhos showcase their talent on the biggest stage.
At mitickets.com, all PSG tickets are 100% official and guaranteed, giving you peace of mind as you support one of Europe’s elite clubs.

Who is the current manager of Paris Saint-Germain?
Paris Saint-Germain are managed by Luis Enrique, who joined in 2023 and continues to lead the team in Ligue 1 and Europe.
When was Paris Saint-Germain founded?
Paris Saint-Germain was founded in 1970, making it one of Europe’s youngest elite clubs.
What is Paris Saint-Germain’s nickname?
PSG are nicknamed “Les Parisiens” and also “Les Rouge-et-Bleu” (“The Red and Blues”).
Can I book Paris Saint-Germain Premium tickets and hospitality packages?
Yes, official PSG Premium tickets and hospitality packages are available via mitickets.com at the Parc des Princes Stadium. Hospitality offers VIP seating, elegant lounges, and fine French dining.
Will my seats be sat together?
Yes, when booking 2 or more tickets, seats are guaranteed to be seated together up to 10 people.
How and when would I receive my tickets?
Your ticket/packages will be delivered via e-mail as PDF’s, 3-5 days before the fixture date.
How it worksOur Simple steps to your tickets
Choose your event
Browse our curated list of top football matches, concerts, and exclusive experiences. Filter by date, team, venue, or category to find the event that suits you.
Pick your seat
View seating options, hospitality packages, and price levels. Whether you’re after VIP treatment or best-value seats, you’ll see full details before checkout.
Secure Checkout
Complete your booking with our secure and user-friendly checkout process. We accept all major payment methods and never store card details.
Get your tickets
Your tickets will be delivered to your inbox or mobile wallet. You’ll also receive event-day info and support from our customer service team.

VIP Matchdays – VIP Tickets – VIP Experience
VIP Matchdays are an experienced hospitality agency specialising in arranging outstanding corporate hospitality packages to the top sporting and music events in both the UK and Worldwide.
We have over 20 years experience in the industry and are very proud to work as partners with over 80 different clubs, venues & agencies, offering over 200 hospitality packages.
It is our attention to detail that sets us apart, nothing is too much trouble to us, our ultimate aim is to ensure you have the most amazing experience at the event of your dreams.
Take a look at the various events pages for more details on our range of hospitality packages to see what’s coming up. We are here to help at any time with any questions or advice you may need.
“From initial enquiry to attending the event, the Hospitality team were excellent. I was kept fully informed and felt “looked after”. Great experience, I would not hesitate to use this company again – John”
